items.name: fetch_usage_snapshot
items.notes: Refile from local-outtake (blocked by CWD bug in prior pass). Correct gate path: cd <source-location> then prewrite-owner-gate.py. Exit 0.

platform_divergence_no_win.name: create_hotspot_window
platform_divergence_no_win.note: mac-only: uses NSWindow (Cocoa) to create floating hotspot overlay. Win has hotspot state/config functions but no window-creation equivalent. Platform divergence, not a gap.

platform_divergence_no_win.name: install_native_hotspot_observers
platform_divergence_no_win.note: mac-only: registers NSNotificationCenter/NSWorkspace observers for native hotspot events. Win has no NSNotification infrastructure. Platform divergence.

platform_divergence_no_win.name: apply_native_hotspot_properties
platform_divergence_no_win.note: mac-only: applies Cocoa NSWindow properties to hotspot window. No apply_hotspot equivalent in win binary. Platform divergence.

platform_divergence_no_win.name: capture_switch_rollback_state
platform_divergence_no_win.note: No match on win. Exhaustive searches empty. Win has rollback_threads_for_router_sys (thread rollback) and relay_manager_set_router_enabled_rollback_sys (relay rollback) but neither matches mac capture-state-before-switch semantics. Absent or folded into differently-named coroutine on win.

platform_divergence_no_win.name: perform_switch_payload_with_restart
platform_divergence_no_win.note: No verbatim match. Win has confirm_pending_auto_switch_and_restart_coroutine@0x1408e4f50 and switch_account_stop_codex_restart@0x14014asource archive0 covering adjacent restart-on-switch semantics, but neither is direct port. Cannot confirm win_addr without deeper decompile.

platform_divergence_no_win.name: load_full_runtime_snapshot
platform_divergence_no_win.note: No exact match. Win has load_snapshot_coroutine_sys@0x1408c2e10 (0xef9B) and build_runtime_snapshot_and_emit_sys@0x14084df80 partially covering. Mac function name has no verbatim win symbol.

platform_divergence_no_win.name: get_cached_display_snapshot
platform_divergence_no_win.note: No match on win. Win has window_manager_snapshot_acquire/clone/release_sys (refcount management) but no display-snapshot query equivalent. Mac uses a display-specific snapshot cache that win does not implement.

platform_divergence_no_win.name: resolve_cached_auto_switch_service_state
platform_divergence_no_win.note: No exact match. Closest win candidate: load_auto_switch_state_sys@0x14055d390 (0x161B) reads auto-switch state. Mac function resolves a cached service-state object. Cannot confirm semantic equivalence without decompile.

platform_divergence_no_win.name: ensure_fresh_token
platform_divergence_no_win.note: No sensitive-field-named function found in win binary across all searches (sensitive-field, auth_token, bearer_token, access_token, ensure_token, token_refresh). sensitive-field refresh/validation may be handled inline or via different mechanism on win. Absent as named symbol.
